series_description: OHIO ELECTIONS COMMISSION CASES WHICH ARE APPEALED TO THE COMMON PLEAS COURT, OHIO SUPREME COURT OR THE UNITED STATES SUPREME COURT.
retention_statement: Paper: MAINTAIN IN THE OFFICE FOR LEGAL REFERENCE PERMANENTLY

series_description: ADVISORY OPINIONS ISSUED BY THE OHIO ELECTIONS COMMISSION
retention_statement: Paper: MAINTAIN IN THE OFFICE PERMANENTLY FOR LEGAL REFERENCE

series_description: OHIO ELECTION LAW COMPLAINTS FILED PURSUANT TO R.C.§3517.08 THROUGH §3517.22 AND §3599.03. THESE COMPLAINTS INVOLVE CANDIDATES FOR POLITICAL OFFICES THROUGHOUT OHIO AND POLITICAL ACTION COMMITTEES. THE FILES CONTAIN A REFERRAL BY THE SECRETARY OF STATE''S OFFICE OR THE COUNTY BOARD OF ELECTIONS AND/OR AN AFFIDAVIT OF COMPLAINT FILED BY THE COMPLAINANT IN ADDITION TO ANY RESPONSES TO ALLEGED VIOLATIONS AND THE DETERMINATION OF THE MATTER.
retention_statement: Paper: MAINTAIN IN THE OFFICE FOR 7 YEARS AFTER THE CASE HAS REACHED FULL DISPOSITION BY THE COMMISSION.
